overview.short: Unao Balaji Sun Temple, a famous and rare sun temple with its own unique architecture, is situated in a small town of Unao in Datia district of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: Unao Balaji Sun Temple, a famous and rare sun temple with its own unique architecture, is situated in a small town of Unao in Datia district of Madhya Pradesh. The Balaji temple was built in the pre-historic time by the king of Datia. Unnao Balaji Maharaj is worshiped by person of Kushwaha Kshatriya caste. Kachhi Kushwaha Kshatriya is the main priest of there.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Unao Balaji Sun Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Unao Balaji Sun Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Unao Balaji Sun Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Jhansi Junction (14 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Unao Balaji Sun Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Unao Balaji Sun Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Unao Balaji Sun Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Unao Balaji Sun Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Unao Balaji Sun Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Unao, Madhya Pradesh.
